title: Copy of Inside England's World Cup prep: Tuchel's squad su...
summary: ESPN's behind-the-scenes coverage examines England's preparation for the World Cup, exploring whether manager Tuchel's squad can end their 60-year wait for a major tournament victory. The feature provides insight into team dynamics and mentality heading into the competition.
content: ESPN followed England throughout their pre-World Cup preparations to answer one question: Are they ready to win a first major tournament in 60 years?

zh.title: 英格兰世界杯准备内幕：图赫尔球队的准备工作
zh.summary: ESPN的幕后报道深入探讨了英格兰的世界杯准备情况，分析图赫尔主教练的球队是否能打破60年重大赛事冠军荒。该报道提供了球队动态和心态调整的深入了解。

title: Arise Irankunda: Australia has new prince as Socce...
summary: Nestory Irankunda delivered a crucial performance to lead Australia to a significant World Cup victory, drawing comparisons to Tim Cahill's iconic moments for the Socceroos. The young talent's impact suggests he could become central to Australia's tournament campaign.
content: Just as Tim Cahill did two decades ago, Nestory Irankunda has lifted the Socceroos to a famous win -- before giving the corner flag a left-right of his own.

zh.title: 伊兰昆达崭露头角：澳大利亚足球的新王子
zh.summary: 内斯托里·伊兰昆达表现关键，带领澳大利亚取得重要的世界杯胜利，其表现与蒂姆·卡希尔为澳大利亚足球队创造的标志性时刻相媲美。这位年轻天才的影响表明他可能成为澳大利亚世界杯运动的中心人物。

title: Was the World Cup win over Paraguay the best in US...
summary: The United States dominated Paraguay 4-1 in their World Cup opener, delivering a performance of such quality that it ranks among the greatest victories in U.S. soccer history. The emphatic win sets a strong tone for the Americans' tournament ambitions.
content: The U.S. got its World Cup off to a flying start with a 4-1 win over Paraguay, a performance so stylish that it will go down in history.

zh.title: 对巴拉圭的世界杯胜利是美国历史最佳吗？
zh.summary: 美国在世界杯首战中以4-1击败巴拉圭，其表现质量之高，跻身美国足球历史最伟大胜利之列。这场压倒性的胜利为美国队的世界杯雄心奠定了坚实基础。

title: Scotland make World Cup drought worth the wait on ...
summary: Scotland ended a lengthy World Cup drought with a significant victory, validating their long wait since last qualifying for the tournament. The success provides a crucial psychological boost heading into the remainder of their group stage campaign.

zh.title: 苏格兰终结世界杯荒漠，长期等待终得回报
zh.summary: 苏格兰以一场重大胜利终结了漫长的世界杯荒漠，证明了他们自上次进入世界杯以来的长期等待是值得的。这一成功为他们在小组赛剩余阶段提供了至关重要的心理优势。

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal shortlist three you...
summary: Bayern Munich is reportedly linked to Manchester United winger Marcus Rashford in the ongoing transfer market activity. The speculation highlights continued European interest in the English talent amid broader summer movement.
content: Bayern Munich are reportedly linked to a move for Marcus Rashford. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.title: 转会传闻新闻：阿森纳关注三大目标
zh.summary: 拜仁慕尼黑据传与曼联边锋马库斯·拉什福德有关联。这种传闻突显了在夏季转会窗口中欧洲对这位英格兰天才的持续兴趣。

title: Bailed out by Vinícius Júnior, Brazil are still a ...
summary: Vinícius Júnior's superb goal salvaged a 1-1 draw for Brazil against Morocco in their World Cup opener, though the Seleção's lackluster display raised concerns about their tournament form. The result highlighted defensive vulnerabilities despite their status as contenders.
content: Vinícius Júnior's superb goal was enough to help Brazil scrape a 1-1 draw in their underwhelming World Cup opener against Morocco.

zh.title: 维尼修斯·朱尼奥尔救场，巴西前景仍堪忧
zh.summary: 维尼修斯·朱尼奥尔的精彩进球为巴西在世界杯首战对阵摩洛哥的比赛中保留了1:1平局，尽管桑巴军团表现不佳引发了对他们赛事状态的担忧。这场比赛突显了防守漏洞，尽管他们拥有争夺者的身份。

title: What's it really like to face World Cup stars Yama...
summary: ESPN's interview series with LaLiga players and coaches offers insights into the challenges of facing two of the World Cup's anticipated biggest stars. The feature provides a rare perspective on how elite defenders and teammates experience playing against top-tier talent.
content: Throughout the season, ESPN has asked LaLiga players and coaches what it's like to take on the duo who are set to be the World Cup's biggest stars.

zh.title: 与世界杯明星交手是什么样的体验？亚玛...
zh.summary: ESPN与西甲球员和教练的采访系列深入了解了与两名世界杯预期最大明星交手的挑战。该报道提供了精英后卫和队友如何体验与顶级人才对阵的罕见视角。

title: Can Argentina really win the World Cup again? What...
summary: Despite being World Cup favorites, Argentina faces the difficult historical challenge of winning consecutive titles, which has never been achieved in the modern era. The analysis examines whether this squad possesses the depth and form necessary to repeat as champions.
content: Argentina are viewed as World Cup favorites, but winning back-to-back titles is rare. Is this Argentina side really built for a repeat win?

zh.title: 阿根廷真的能再次赢得世界杯吗？什么...
zh.summary: 尽管阿根廷是世界杯的热门球队，但他们面临着赢得连续冠军的困难历史性挑战，这在现代足球中从未实现过。该分析探讨了这支球队是否拥有蝉联冠军所需的深度和状态。

title: Vinícius Jr. rescues draw for Brazil against Moroc...
summary: Brazil salvaged a 1-1 draw against Morocco in their World Cup opener with a late Vinícius Jr. goal, but coach Carlo Ancelotti attributed the team's poor start to nerves and pressure. The result highlighted defensive vulnerabilities that could prove costly against stronger opponents.
content: Brazil boss Carlo Ancelotti suggested "nerves" got the better of his players during a dreadful start to their opening World Cup fixture against Morocco as his team settled for a 1-1 draw.

zh.title: 维尼修斯·朱尼奥尔为巴西对摩洛哥的比赛挽救了平局...
zh.summary: 巴西在世界杯首战中凭借维尼修斯·朱尼奥尔的后期进球扳成1-1平手，但教练卡洛·安切洛蒂将球队糟糕的开局归咎于紧张和压力。这一结果暴露了防线漏洞，这可能会对阵强队时付出代价。

title: Giroud: Pulisic reminded me of Hazard at Chelsea
summary: Olivier Giroud compares Christian Pulisic's playing style to Eden Hazard, praising the American winger's talent and potential ahead of the World Cup. The comparison from his former Chelsea teammate underscores Pulisic's quality on the global stage.
content: Olivier Giroud has said his former Chelsea and AC Milan teammate Christian Pulisic "reminded him of Eden Hazard."

zh.title: 吉鲁：普利西奇让我想起切尔西时期的阿扎尔
zh.summary: 奥利维耶·吉鲁将克里斯蒂安·普利西奇的比赛风格与伊登·阿扎尔进行比较，对这位美国边锋的才华和世界杯前的潜力表示赞扬。前切尔西队友的比较强调了普利西奇在全球舞台上的实力。

title: 2 Texas men charged after England WC gear stolen
summary: Two Texas men face felony charges for receiving stolen property after England's World Cup equipment was stolen before a match. The incident raises questions about security procedures and team preparations ahead of important fixtures.
content: Two men have been charged with one felony count each of receiving stolen property late Saturday after England's national team discovered that some of their equipment had been stolen.

zh.title: 英格兰世界杯装备被盗后，2名德州男子被控
zh.summary: 在英格兰世界杯装备在比赛前被盗后，两名德州男子因接收被盗财产而面临重罪指控。该事件引发了对安全程序和重要比赛前球队准备的质疑。

title: Swiss devastated as proud Qatar win 1st WC point
summary: Qatar claimed a dramatic late equalizer to earn a 1-1 draw against Switzerland in Group B, delivering a major upset in the World Cup. The result gives the underdogs crucial momentum despite being heavy tournament underdogs.
content: Qatar scored a stoppage-time goal to earn a shocking 1-1 draw with Group B favorites Switzerland on Saturday.

zh.title: 瑞士失落，卡塔尔赢得首个世界杯积分
zh.summary: 卡塔尔通过戏剧性的后期扳平，与瑞士在B组以1-1战平，创造了世界杯的重大冷门。尽管他们被看作本赛事的大冷门，但这个结果给他们带来了关键的动力。

title: Scotland ease 'pressure' with 1st WC win since 199...
summary: Scotland secured their first World Cup victory since 1998 with a win over Haiti, easing the psychological burden on Steve Clarke's team. The result provides momentum and confidence heading into the team's next challenge against Morocco.
content: Steve Clarke said his Scotland side's long-awaited World Cup win over Haiti means the team have less pressure on them as they prepare to face Morocco.

zh.title: 苏格兰以首次世界杯胜利缓解"压力"自1998年以来首胜
zh.summary: 苏格兰在击败海地的比赛中取得了自1998年以来的首次世界杯胜利，缓解了史蒂夫·克拉克球队肩上的心理负担。这场胜利为球队面对摩洛哥的下一个挑战提供了动力和信心。

title: Depay fit to start as Netherlands prepare for Japa...
summary: The Netherlands received positive injury news with Ronald Koeman confirming Memphis Depay and Bart Verbruggen are available to start against Japan in their Group F opener. The availability of these key players strengthens Dutch prospects in a competitive group.
content: Netherlands have been handed a major boost after Ronald Koeman said Memphis Depay and Bart Verbruggen are both fit to start Sunday's Group F opener against Japan.

zh.title: 德佩状态良好，荷兰队备战日本比赛
zh.summary: 荷兰队传来了积极的伤病消息，罗纳德·科曼确认门菲斯·德佩和巴特·费尔布鲁根可以在小组F的首场比赛中出场迎战日本。这些关键球员的出场增强了荷兰队在这个竞争激烈的小组中的前景。

title: Sources: Chicago want Goretzka, Lewandowski
summary: Chicago is reportedly interested in signing Leon Goretzka and Robert Lewandowski, with the possibility of one German World Cup player extending his U.S. stay beyond the tournament. The transfer speculation highlights the league's ambitions to attract top European talent.
content: As Germany opens its World Cup against Curacao on Sunday, one of its players may end up extending his stay in the United States beyond the tournament.

zh.title: 消息源：芝加哥想要戈雷茨卡和莱万多夫斯基
zh.summary: 据报道，芝加哥有意签下莱昂·戈雷茨卡和罗伯特·莱万多夫斯基，其中一位德国世界杯球员可能会将其美国停留时间延长至赛事之后。这一转会传言突出了该联赛吸引欧洲顶级人才的野心。

title: Was this offside? Technology fault leaves questions over VAR images
summary: FIFA blamed a technical fault for delaying VAR images after a controversial offside call in Qatar's World Cup draw with Switzerland. The incident raised questions about the reliability of VAR technology in critical match moments.
content: Fifa have blamed a technical fault for the delay in releasing the VAR images after a potential - and controversial - offside call during Qatar's World Cup draw with Switzerland.

zh.title: 这是越位吗？技术故障引发对VAR图像的质疑
zh.summary: FIFA将VAR图像延迟的原因归咎于技术故障，这发生在卡塔尔与瑞士世界杯平局中的一个有争议的越位判罚之后。该事件引发了人们对VAR技术在关键比赛时刻可靠性的质疑。

title: Spectacular Vinicius Jr goal earns Brazil draw against Morocco
summary: Vinicius Jr scored a spectacular solo goal to secure a draw for five-time World Cup winners Brazil against Morocco at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey. The goal demonstrated the Brazilian forward's individual quality in an opening Group C match.
content: Vinicius Jr scores a spectacular solo goal to earn a draw for five-time winners Brazil against Morocco at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

zh.title: 维尼修斯Jr精彩进球为巴西对阵摩洛哥平局立功
zh.summary: 维尼修斯Jr在新泽西州大都会体育场对阵摩洛哥的比赛中打入精彩进球，为五次世界杯冠军巴西赢得平局。这个进球在C组首场比赛中展现了这位巴西前锋的个人实力。
